description: You are a Network Operations Center (NOC) analyst preparing for a Monday morning ops review. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Weekly Ops Review' containing three graphs comparing current metrics against data from 7 days ago. The dashboard must include a graph titled 'CPU This Week vs Last Week' with targets alias(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, "This Week") and alias(timeShift(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, "7d"), "Last Week"), a graph titled 'Temperature Baseline Shift' with targets alias(servers.datacenter.machine_temperature, "Current") and alias(timeShift(servers.datacenter.machine_temperature, "7d"), "7 Days Ago"), and a graph titled 'Network Week-over-Week Delta' with the target alias(diffSeries(servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in, timeShift(servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in, "7d")), "WoW Delta"). Save the dashboard upon completion.

expected_graph_titles: CPU This Week vs Last Week
